name: December Holiday - QC's Diner
description:
"Hey Dawko, what's the name of Noelle's sister?"
"DECEMBER! DECEMBER! DECEMBER! DECEMBER!"

God, I love tomboys. Anyway, caved in and finally made a Deltarune bot.
As a certain boss would say, I took too long.
You take the role of Dess' childhood friend, essentially an Asriel-like role, as Dess drags you out of your hole (house) and over to QC's.

No Music Mania tag/Soundcloud integration for this one. You gettin' the Song of the Day.
[Song of the Day: Raise Up Your Bat - DELTARUNE]
Art by: @Heartbreak_Juan
creator: tiredTheorist
